screens.name: Landing page MVP
notes: Frontend implementation was realigned to the updated Brand Red / Natural Green / Warm Beige / Dark Grey tokens.
Temporary generated image URLs were removed from React components and replaced with persistent placeholders until Sanity or public assets are approved.
Next planned screen is the Sanity-backed Kamianets-Podilskyi city page.

screens.name: Tickets MVP
notes: Uses the ticketInfo Sanity singleton for price, ticket availability text, and the external box office URL.
Renders safe placeholder states until the final service partner URL is available.
